title: EUR/USD 3.15 RR this morning — the setup was obvious once I stopped guessing direction
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
I've missed this exact setup a dozen times before.

Not because it wasn't there. Because I entered too early, without structure.

Here's what the chart was telling me this time: — Clean demand zone holding (gray box) — Price compressing then breaking structure to the upside — EMA 200 curling — momentum shifting — Ascending channel confirming the move

Waited for the break. Entered with a defined invalidation below the zone.

Result : +$214 / RR 3.15

The edge wasn't prediction. It was patience + structure validation.

What's your process when price is sitting on a key zone like this — do you enter on the touch or wait for confirmation?

comments.author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
comments.body:
